name: Wo war's?
description: Wo war's? is Reiner Knizia's children's deduction game — players move adventurer pawns through a fairy-tale village trying to discover where stolen objects were hidden. An electronic "magic compass" device whispers clues based on player positions; cooperate to recover all the lost treasures before night falls. Atmospheric, charming, and friendly to memory-trained six-year-olds.
